design_philosophy: Pitch-worthy, highly legible, professional, and trustworthy. Strict black text on pure white surfaces with strong structural borders. Avoids 'AI-slop' gradients completely; instead uses bold typography, high-contrast layouts, and Electric Cobalt as the primary action color. Feels like a premium enterprise productivity tool.

fonts.heading: Manrope
fonts.instructions: Use @expo-google-fonts/manrope and @expo-google-fonts/inter. If not feasible during pitch dev, fallback to system fonts (San Francisco/Roboto) with strict weights.

Onboarding.layout: Hero image top (40% height), bold copy in center, primary CTA at bottom. Minimalist, premium pitch.
key_elements: Subtitle: 'Real-time translation for meetings, streams, and global teams.'

HomeDashboard.layout: Header with user profile and greeting. Quick action row (Join, Host, Settings). Section for 'Active Plugins' and 'Recent Meetings'.
key_elements: Large floating action button or prominent card for 'Start Live Translation'.
Horizontal scroll list of Plugin Previews (Google Meet, Zoom, etc.) indicating 'Install Plugin'.
Recent Transcripts list (Title, Date, Languages used).

LiveTranslation.layout: Dark or high-contrast screen. Top nav with meeting info and connection status. Center stage for dynamic translated text. Bottom area for waveforms and controls.
key_elements: Current Speaker Pill (e.g., '👤 Alex is speaking Spanish').
Animated Audio Waveform using react-native-reanimated. Color reacts to voice volume (Brand Color or Live Recording Pink).
Bottom Controls: Mute toggle, End Meeting (Red), Switch Target Language.

HistoryDetail.layout: Transcript view. Split or toggle layout.
key_elements: List of chat bubbles or transcript blocks. Each block shows Original Language on top (small), Target Language below (large).

PluginPreviews.layout: Simulated overlays. A React Native screen that looks exactly like a Google Meet or Zoom mobile call, with the 'Translation Widget' floating on top.
key_elements: Host platform UI framing (e.g., Teams purple header).
Floating Glassmorphism widget displaying real-time captions.

interactions.waveform: Use react-native-reanimated for smooth, spring-based bar scaling to simulate voice detection. Not a static GIF.
interactions.buttons: Implement scale-down on press (0.95) using TouchableOpacity or Pressable.
interactions.haptics: Trigger light haptic feedback on language switch and meeting start/stop (use expo-haptics).

hero_images.description: Professional using smartphone, representing the mobile app interface.

media.icons: Use @expo/vector-icons (Feather or Ionicons) exclusively for standard UI iconography.

instructions_to_main_agent: Build this as a standard Expo React Native project. DO NOT USE SHADCN OR TAILWIND unless utilizing NativeWind. Use pure React Native StyleSheet if standard React Native.
Use standard View, Text, TouchableOpacity, ScrollView, and FlatList components.
Ensure ALL interactive elements include testID prop (e.g., testID='start-translation-button').
For the Plugin Preview views, construct simulated views using hardcoded absolute positioned bars that mimic Meet/Teams colors, and place the translation widget overlay on top.
Do not use external web libraries. Rely on expo-blur for glassmorphism effects and expo-linear-gradient for smooth color transitions.
The Live Translation UI must look premium. Emphasize large typography for translated text and distinct UI hierarchy.
